Students must complete two Distributive Studies courses that are approved for Big Question courses. To complete all requirements following this plan, the Understanding Plural Societies (UP) and Cultural Competence (CC) courses must also fulfill Distributive Studies categories. **Transfer students entering between Fall 2024-Spring 2026 should default to the 23-S24 plan Updated Spring 2026 - ADA
